faqs.question: What types of bathroom sinks and faucets do you install?
faqs.answer: We install pedestal sinks, vessel sinks, undermount sinks, wall-mounted sinks, and all faucet styles including single-handle, widespread, and touchless models.

faqs.question: How do I know if my bathroom faucet needs replacing?
faqs.answer: Signs include persistent dripping, rust or mineral buildup, difficulty turning handles, low water pressure, or visible corrosion. Older faucets may also lack water-saving features.

faqs.question: Can you fix a slow-draining bathroom sink?
faqs.answer: Yes, slow drains are often caused by hair, soap buildup, or pipe obstructions. We can clear the clog and inspect the drain assembly to prevent future issues.
